---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What problem are you trying to solve?

A clear description of the user need. e.g. "I want to compare two players
side-by-side without leaving the prediction flow."

## Proposed solution

What you'd like the feature to look like or do. UI sketches, links to
similar features in other apps, or rough copy are all welcome.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about and why you'd prefer the proposed one.

## Phase / area

Which part of the bible this lands in (e.g. Phase 4 Intelligence, Phase 6
wishlist) — if you're not sure, leave blank and a maintainer will tag it.

## Additional context

Mockups, prior art, related issues, anything else relevant.
